name: Fighting Immunosenescence and Promoting Immunity by a Fasting-mimicking Diet Elderly.
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov unknown-status 40-participant randomized single-masked fasting-mimicking diet trial in frailty, inflammation, and immune-system-disorder context, with safety, feasibility, flu-vaccine immune response, and frailty-prevention endpoints and no posted results in the June 11, 2026 API view.
